name: The SIGReg Objective as Variational Free Energy: A Theoretical Active-Inference Account of JEPA World Models
summary: arXiv:2607.13612v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) are the dominant design for latent world models, yet they are usually justified by empirical perfo...
description: arXiv:2607.13612v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) are the dominant design for latent world models, yet they are usually justified by empirical performance rather than a normative principle. We show that the choice of anti-collapse regulariser determines whether a JEPA's training objective, a prediction loss plus a weighted embedding regulariser,...
author: Fabio Arnez, Alexandra Gomez-Villa
